channel.title: SSbusinessAndMarket
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from SSbusinessAndMarket, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Samsung's UK boss keeps a signed $100 bill she is never allowed to spend and shares her best and worst investments
item.description: Samsung's top UK executive bought her first flat at auction with two credit cards, admits work-life balance is a myth, and always carries a $100 bill.

item.title: Jack Link's CEO shares his message for Gen Z workers: Commit, stick to it, and be really good at it
item.description: Jack Link's grew from a family jerky recipe into a global empire, and CEO Troy Link says success starts with small-town roots and a lot of grit.

item.title: If Elon Musk merges SpaceX with Tesla he will create a $3.4 trillion behemoth with zero profits
item.description: A SpaceX-Tesla union would mark by far the largest merger of all time.

item.title: Psychologist says devices and social media, not immigration, are behind low U.S. reading scores
item.description: Social media and digital devices distract students in class, according to San Diego State University psychology professor Jean Twenge.
